name: codex-game-studios
description: Codex plugin and project template for structured solo and small-team game development workflows.

interface.shortDescription: Game studio workflows, role cards, gates, and templates for Codex.
interface.longDescription: A Codex-adapted version of Claude Code Game Studios. It provides cgs-* skills, studio role cards, design and production templates, rules, engine references, and validation scripts for guided game development.
defaultPrompt: Use $cgs-start to set up a new game project.
Use $cgs-dev-story to implement the next story.
